scripts.build:ui: cd .. && npm run build -w @sfl-digging-hub/shared && npm run build -w @sfl-digging-hub/web
scripts.deploy: npm run build:ui && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:beta: npm run build:ui && wrangler deploy --env beta
scripts.cf:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply sfl-digging-hub --remote --env production
scripts.cf:migrate:beta: wrangler d1 migrations apply sfl-digging-hub-beta --remote --env beta
